category_sources: source_facts.description: Synchronize your DNS to multiple providers from a simple DSL.
display_name_sources: Official project branding on source_facts.homepage is DNSControl; source_facts.name gives dnscontrol.
docs_sources: Official DNSControl documentation domain is the dedicated docs surface; source_facts.homepage is the official project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/DNSControl/dnscontrol; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies DNS synchronization to multiple providers using a DSL; source_facts.executables lists dnscontrol.
